banner.description: Connect your wallet and let the contract handle the wheel. Every spin executes on-chain, with full visibility into odds, bets, and payouts.

benefits.title: Your Funds, Your Control
benefits.description: Non-custodial by design — your C-Chip balance stays in your own wallet at all times.

benefits.title: Transparent Odds
benefits.description: House edge and payout tables are published up front. No hidden terms, no shifting odds mid-session.

benefits.title: Fully Trackable
benefits.description: A live dashboard gives full visibility into bets, spins, and settlements as they happen.

benefits.title: Verifiable Fairness
benefits.description: Every result is emitted as an on-chain event, so outcomes can be checked independently — not just trusted.
